primaryText: [Scene: Sirens wailing outside. I look panicked. Enter Bro with a briefcase.]
translationText: (Adegan: Sirine berbunyi di luar. Aku panik. Bro masuk membawa koper.)

primaryText: "The police are coming! The boss framed me for corruption!"
translationText: “Polisi datang! Bos menjebakku atas kasus korupsi!”

primaryText: "I know. He made you the scapegoat. If you get caught, your life is over."
translationText: “Aku tahu. Dia menjadikanmu kambing hitam. Kalau tertangkap, hidupmu hancur.”

primaryText: "With these 10 evidence documents. You must take them to 10 different directors across the city."
translationText: “Dengan 10 dokumen bukti ini. Kamu harus membawanya ke 10 direktur berbeda di seluruh kota.”

primaryText: "Get an official <color=red>CAP (STAMP)</color> from each one to make them legally valid. Then, bring them to the Supreme Court."
translationText: “Dapatkan cap resmi dari masing-masing direktur agar sah secara hukum. Lalu, bawa ke Mahkamah Agung.”

primaryText: "10 directors across the city? That's a long travel. What if the documents get ruined on the way?"
translationText: “10 direktur di seluruh kota? Perjalanannya jauh sekali. Bagaimana kalau dokumennya rusak di jalan?”

primaryText: "If even one gets damaged, you lose your proof and go to jail forever. Protect them with your life!"
translationText: “Kalau ada satu saja yang rusak, kamu kehilangan bukti dan dipenjara selamanya. Jaga dengan nyawamu!”

primaryText: "10 offices. 10 <color=red>CAPS (STAMPS)</color>. Save my life. Got it."
"Now go out the back door. Run!"
